Phase-23.NAME: Compact Mobile User Cabinet
Phase-23.goal: Redesign the user personal cabinet into a compact mobile-first workflow focused on VPN access, subscription state, devices, and config delivery.

scope.included: User dashboard layout, device/config actions, subscription summary, payment entry points, responsive navigation, and mobile polish.
scope.excluded: Backend API redesign, deployment changes, billing provider changes, and admin console redesign.

Phase-23.step-1: Inventory current user frontend screens and classify content as primary, secondary, or removable from mobile first view.
Phase-23.step-2: Design the mobile home screen with VPN status, primary config action, QR/download action, and active device summary.
Phase-23.step-3: Design compact subscription and payment surfaces with clear status, expiry, plan, and renewal action.
Phase-23.step-4: Design the mobile device management flow for create, rotate, revoke, and config retrieval without wide tables.
Phase-23.step-5: Apply compact UI system rules: no nested cards, no decorative clutter, stable button/list sizing, and phone-safe text.
Phase-23.step-6: Verify build and mobile smoke paths for login, dashboard, config download/QR, subscription, and devices.

verification.check-2: Mobile viewport has no horizontal scroll or overlapping text.
verification.check-3: Primary VPN config action is reachable within one or two taps.
verification.check-4: Existing backend API contracts remain unchanged unless explicitly approved later.
